title: Ukraine strikes Russia's lifeblood by targeting oil ports
subhed: Long-range Ukrainian drones hit three key infrastructures for Russian crude oil exports, as Kyiv aims to limit Moscow's windfall from surging oil prices.

France's political parties still don't know how to select their presidential candidates
subhed: With the local elections finished, the race for the presidency is kicking off. Except for the far right and the radical left, parties now face the pressing question of how to select their candidates for the 2027 presidential election.

title: Israel introduces death penalty for Palestinians accused of 'terrorist' murders
subhed: The law, passed by 62 lawmakers to 48, marks turning point in Israel's penal policy and further weakens the rule of law in the country.

title: Céline Dion picks Paris for her return to the stage after a six-year hiatus
subhed: After several days of hints, the Canadian star waited for her birthday to announce her first concert dates since 2020: She will be in residence for 10 nights at Paris La Défense Arena, between September 12 and October 14.

title: Spice up your life! Five Paris restaurants where you can eat spicy food
subhed: Mexican chipotle, Korean kimchi, Tunisian harissa: Whether mild or fiery, these condiments add zest to dishes from around the world. Here are five addresses in Paris and Montreuil to awaken your taste buds.
